title: episode 24 questions
wikitext:
[]: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jan 04, 2007 1:35 pm I have 2 questions about episode 24' that I has be puzzled. Why is Rei still undergoing Synchro testing? Isn't unit 00 destroyed? Does "EVA series" refer to all eva units from 00 to whatever? And wouldn't that mean that even unit 01 came from adam? Thanks.

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 04, 2007 1:45 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: Why is Rei still undergoing Synchro testing? Isn't unit 00 destroyed?

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 04, 2007 1:55 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: Why is Rei still undergoing Synchro testing? Isn't unit 00 destroyed?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jan 04, 2007 2:06 pm thanks for the replies. But seriously, I can't believe how much discussion Evangelion is causing even today. Usually I don't try to overanalyze a particular piece of work, but with Eva I just can't help it.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Thu Jan 04, 2007 5:51 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: thanks for the replies. But seriously, I can't believe how much discussion Evangelion is causing even today. Usually I don't try to overanalyze a particular piece of work, but with Eva I just can't help it.

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sat Jan 06, 2007 8:44 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Tokpile Quohog wrote: Why is Rei still undergoing Synchro testing? Isn't unit 00 destroyed?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 06, 2007 8:48 pm The problem there is EVA-01 looks physically like the other Evas and nothing like Lilith. The only thing that remotely makes sense is Lilith's biomass was rearanged by Adam's DNA making EVA-01 effectively Lilith's suragate child with Adam giving the genetic template.

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 9:16 pm Rawinder wrote: I have no idea what you've written there

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 06, 2007 9:21 pm Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Lilith's biomass was rearanged by Adam's DNA

[]: Re: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 9:32 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I didn't want to start another are the Seeds female debate, SUE ME!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 06, 2007 9:38 pm Yes I did in a vague way. I just didn't want to address that to avoid said debate.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 9:42 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Yes I did in a vague way. I just didn't want to address that to avoid said debate.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:04 am Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Yes I did in a vague way. I just didn't want to address that to avoid said debate.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:24 am ... What does THAT ISSUE have to do with my question? You said something about EVA-01 being made by "rearranging" Lilith, and I asked how it could be "rearranging" if additional biomass was involved. That's it. OH YEAH BY THE WAY LILITH AND EVA-01 ARE GIRLS BUT I BET YOU ALREADY KNOW THAT LOL puppysex

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:36 am What the hell do you want? I said it was a cop-out to avoid a certain topic. Do I think EVA-01 rearranged Lilith's biomass? Nope! Am I going to state what I think really happened? Nope! I figured that was a safe way to say EVA-01 is still an Adam copy that came out of Lilith without the obligatory are the Seeds female debate as last I checked that's not the topic here. We can go back to the Gender/Sex of Non-Lilim Persons thread if you want but not everyone likes the idea as you've noticed. lol typo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:00 am Oh, gotcha. :hides under her desk: EDIT: AEF wrote: What the hell do you want?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:13 am Reichu wrote: AEF wrote: What the hell do you want?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:15 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: WTF? Now you seriously creep me out.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:30 am Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: WTF? Now you seriously creep me out.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sun Jan 07, 2007 5:16 am Rei was probably being tested beside Kaworu to see who had the highest Synch ratio and, therefore, who was the best candidate for Unit 02.
summary:
[]: episode 24' questions             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jan 04, 2007 1:35 pm I have 2 questions about episode 24' that I has be puzzled. Why is Rei still undergoing Synchro testing? Isn't unit 00 destroyed? Does "EVA series" refer to all eva units from 00 to whatever? And wouldn't that mean that even unit 01 came from adam? Thanks.

[]: Re: episode 24' questions        &nb
